name: Bank of Ireland SBCI Home Energy Upgrade
notes: SEAI grant required · 75% of loan on qualifying energy works · Rate verified 21 Jul 2026 directly on BOI's SBCI page (personalbanking.bankofireland.com/borrow/loans/home-energy-upgrade-loan-scheme/) — three worked examples all show 2.95% variable.

name: AIB SBCI Home Energy Upgrade
notes: SEAI grant required · 75% of loan on qualifying energy works

name: PTSB SBCI Home Energy Upgrade
notes: SEAI grant required · Tiered rate — €5k–€14,999 band shown; 2.99% rate (3.00% APR) for €50k–€75k. Rate sourced from CCPC.ie (PTSB's own site blocks automated checks) — confirm directly with PTSB before publishing if in doubt.

name: AIB Green Personal Loan
notes: 50%+ of loan must go toward green upgrades

name: Bank of Ireland Green Car / Home Improvement
notes: Electric or plug-in hybrid only / energy efficiency works

name: PTSB Personal Loan
notes: Rate shown for €10k band. Max APR 8.80%. €1k–€75k, up to 84 months

name: Bank of Ireland Personal Loan
notes: Rate shown for €10k band. Can defer first 3 payments. €2k–€75k, up to 84 months

name: An Post Money Personal Loan
notes: Rate shown for €5k–€19,999 band; 6.90% APR for €20k+. No early repayment fee. €5k–€75k, up to 120 months

name: Revolut Personal Loan
notes: Best-case rate shown — Revolut's own €10,000/60-month representative example (6.31% variable / 6.5% APR). Range 6.5–12.99% APR by credit score. €1k–€50k, up to 60 months

name: Avant Money Personal Loan (under €30k)
notes: Max APR 19.9%. €5k–€29,999, up to 84 months

name: AIB Home Improvement Loan
notes: AIB does not price a separate Home Improvement Loan — uses the same rate as AIB Personal Loan (8.65% variable / 8.95% APR). €1k–€75k, up to 120 months

name: AIB Personal Loan
notes: 3-hour decision for existing customers. €1k–€75k, up to 60 months

name: Credit Union average Personal Loan — ILCU affiliated
notes: ILCU affiliated — illustrative average APR across affiliated credit unions (ILCU data collected Jun–Aug 2025, not a live rate). No monthly repayment example published for this average.

name: AIB Click Visa
notes: Online-only application. No 0% intro — 13.8% standard APR is Ireland's lowest.

name: AIB Platinum Visa
balanceTransfer: 3.83% (variable) on purchases & balance transfers for first 12 months, then standard rate. BT from store/non-AIB cards only; capped at €5,000.
notes: Minimum €40k salary. Cashback 0.5% on annual spend €5k–€50k (max €225/yr). Up to 56 days interest-free.

name: Revolut Credit Card
balanceTransfer: 0% on balance transfers & purchases for up to 6 months (must meet minimum monthly payments)
notes: App-only, near-instant decision. Limit up to €10,000. RevPoints rewards. Cash-advance APR 19.99%.

name: Bank of Ireland Platinum Advantage
balanceTransfer: 0% on BT for 7 months or 0% on purchases for 6 months (new customers choose one), then standard rate.
notes: Worldwide travel insurance. Minimum €40k salary.

name: Bank of Ireland Affinity
balanceTransfer: 2.9% (fixed) on BT for 12 months. No intro purchase offer. Then standard rate.
notes: Charity-linked cards.

name: Bank of Ireland Classic
balanceTransfer: 0% on BT for 7 months or 0% on purchases for 6 months (new customers choose one), then standard rate.
notes: No annual card fee.

name: PTSB Ice Visa
balanceTransfer: 0% on BT for 6 months, plus 0% on purchases for 3 months, then standard rate. One BT per card.

name: Bank of Ireland Aer Credit Card
balanceTransfer: 0% on BT for 7 months or 0% on purchases for 6 months (new customers choose one), then standard rate. Annual fee billed €6.50/month.
notes: Aer Lingus / AerClub rewards.

name: AIB 'be'
balanceTransfer: 3.83% (variable) on purchases & balance transfers for first 12 months, then standard rate. BT from store/non-AIB cards only; capped at €5,000.
notes: Two-tier purchase rate.

name: An Post Money Classic
balanceTransfer: 0% on BT for 12 months (transfer within 90 days of opening), then 16.8% / 22.9% APR. Ireland's longest 0% BT window.

name: An Post Money Flex
notes: 0% on purchases for 9 months (Ireland's longest purchase intro). Money transfers 5.9% for 24 months. Instalment plan from 8.6% APR on purchases over €250. Rate corrected 21 Jul 2026 via CCPC.ie — Flex is a distinct, cheaper product from An Post Money Classic and was previously showing Classic's rate in error.

name: Avant Money One Card
balanceTransfer: 0% on balance transfers for 9 months (transfer within 90 days of opening), then reverts to standard rate. €150 cashback on a €1,000+ balance transfer.
notes: 0% on purchases for 3 months; 0% on balance transfers for 9 months; €150 cashback conditional on €1,000+ balance transfer within 90 days. Confirmed 21 Jul 2026 via CCPC.ie (Avant Money's own site blocks automated checks) — the 9-month balance-transfer window is correct; the separate 12-month window mentioned on Avant's site is for their distinct "money transfer" feature, not balance transfer.
